---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are their trade-offs?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other apps, or other context that helps explain the idea.

## Checklist

Before submitting, please confirm:

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this hasn't been requested before
- [ ] This feature aligns with Ritemark's local-first, privacy-first principles
